title: Cross-module cumsum routes
summary: Expose cumsum states as single-source encoder/HLM/decoder route inputs instead of retaining multi-layer source histories.
hypothesis: Cross-module residual reads can retain useful information while using one stable accumulated source per module.
design: Add module route exports and update concept-read-encoder, decoder-read-encoder and decoder-read-concept source selection independently of same-module cumsum state.

delta.summary: Expose cumsum states as single-source encoder/HLM/decoder route inputs instead of retaining multi-layer source histories.

operations.after: one cumsum route export per module
operations.rationale: D10 changes cross-module source semantics and therefore builds only on D06b.

code_symbols.summary: ConceptLMV21Model route-source builders and decoder source selection.

analysis.conclusion: The source-count and routing changes are explicit; no committed A/B outcome establishes their effect.
limitations: The associated A/B launcher is evidence of intended validation, not a successful result.

evidence.summary: Adds cross-module cumsum route sources between encoder, HLM concept and decoder.
Single-module route exports and decoder cross-read source selection.

work-repo.note: Derived private work-repository evidence; never root or official OLMo-3 provenance.

title_zh: 跨模块路由累积式改写
summary_zh: 将跨模块 residual-read 的 source 从来源模块逐层历史改为每个模块对外提供一个 cumsum 累积状态；它与 Self-DD 的累积式改写作用对象不同，可独立消融。
